---
name: debug-issue
description: Investigate and resolve bugs using a structured reproduction-to-verification workflow.
---

# Debug Issue

Diagnose issues methodically from reproduction to root cause to validated fix.

Ask for reproduction context and observed versus expected behavior if not provided.

## Requirements

- Reproduce the issue before proposing a fix.
- Isolate root cause with minimal assumptions.
- Implement targeted corrections with limited blast radius.
- Verify fix and check for regressions in related paths.
- Summarize root cause, resolution, and prevention notes.
